issues.description: TrashFromHand should trash 1 card from hand (any type), not filtered to Character. Official text says 'trash 1 card from your hand' without type restriction.

Rest action should be conditional on successful trash, but more critically: the ReturnToHand action is missing the prerequisite condition 'If your Leader has the {Kuja Pirates} type'. This condition must wrap the entire effect or be checked before ReturnToHand executes.
ReturnToHand target is incomplete. Must allow choosing up to 1 Character with EITHER {Amazon Lily} OR {Kuja Pirates} type, not just Amazon Lily. Current target only filters Amazon Lily.
